LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT FORTNEY & WEYGANDT, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE OF INSUFFICIENT SERVICE PER CCP 1005, WHICH REQUIRES AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS FOR NOTICE OF HEARING, AND AN ADDITIONAL 5 CALENDAR DAYS FOR SERVICE BY MAIL PER CCP 1005(B). THIS MOTION SHOULD RE-NOTICED FOR HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 501. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS-DEFENDANT FORTNEY & WEYGANDT, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT OF RUBECON GENERAL CONTRACTING, INCORPORATED IS SUSTAINED WITH FIFTEEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGED ULTIMATE FACTS ABOUT THE TERMS OF THE ALLEGED CONTRACTS. SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 to place settlement on the record.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Kris A. Cox, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant Rubecon General Contracting, Inc.
Jonathan T. Rodriguez, Esq., appearing for Defendants and Cross Complainants:
Apartments Investment and Management Company, All Hallows Preservation, L.P., Bayview Preservation, L.P., La Salle Preservation, L.P., Shoreview Preservation, L.P.,
Robert W. Marchi, Esq., appearing on behalf of Cross Defendant Rubecon General Contracting, Inc.
Reuben Santana is voir dired on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Erik Howe is voir dired on behalf of the defendant.
Terms and conditions of Settlement read into the record.
Counsel for Defendant to submit first draft of settlement by Wednesday, August 28, 2013 to other party.
Court remains jurisdiction to enforce judgment per CCP 664.6
Court adjourned.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT FORTNEY & WEYGANDT, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is off calendar because of insufficient service per CCP 1005, which requires at least 16 court days for notice of hearing, and an additional 5 calendar days for service by mail per CCP 1005(b). This motion should re-noticed for hearing in Department 501. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Dec-05-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steven F. Brockhage, Esq. of Smith & Brockhage, Tel. 925.296.0636, for Cross-Defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT FORTNEY & WEYGANDT, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend. Cross Complainant has still failed to allege ultimate facts about the terms of the alleged oral contract between Cross Complainant and Cross Defendants. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Continued To Oct-03-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JASON A. ROSE OF THE BRADLEY CURLEY & KOWALSKI LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 464-8888 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY, STEVEN F. BROCKHAGE OF SMITH & BROCKHAGE, TEL. NO. (925) 296-0636 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - JUDGE KAHN DISCLOSED THAT MR. BROCKHAGE WAS A CLASSMATE, 15 YEARS AGO AND DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT FORTNEY & WEYGANDT, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT OF RUBECON GENERAL CONTRACTING, INCORPORATED is Sustained with fifteen days leave to amend to alleged ultimate facts about the terms of the alleged contracts. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
